errors.unauthorized: Session expired — please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to that.
errors.apiUnreachable: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

hero.subtitle: Kaibot replies to your customers on WhatsApp 24/7 — answering questions, qualifying leads, and handing off to a human only when it truly matters.
hero.chatPreviewUser1: Hi! Do you ship to Mexico?
hero.chatPreviewBot1: Yes, we ship across all of Mexico — usually 2-4 business days. Want me to pass you a shipping quote?

features.title: Built so customers never wait.
features.subtitle: A focused set of capabilities — no fluff, no setup gymnastics.
features.alwaysOnBody: Kaibot answers every message in seconds — at 3 AM, on weekends, during launches. No customer is left hanging.
features.nativeBody: Plugs into the channel your customers already use every day. No app to download, no new habits to learn.
features.trainedBody: Upload your docs, FAQs, and policies. Kaibot learns your voice and answers like part of your team.

how.title: Up and running in minutes.
how.step1Body: Link your business number in a couple of clicks. No code, no complicated setup.
how.step2Body: Upload documents, pricing, and FAQs. Kaibot reads everything and is ready in under an hour.
how.step3Body: Kaibot replies on its own and pings a human only when the conversation truly needs one.

cta.title: Give your business a 24/7 assistant.
cta.subtitle: Sign in to your company workspace and start replying faster than ever.

login.title: Sign in with email
login.subtitle: Manage your bots, conversations, and customers in one place.

register.title: Register your company
register.subtitle: Creates a tenant and an OWNER user to manage your bots.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
register.errorSlugFormat: Slug must be kebab-case (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens).

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Account details and password for your user. Only you can change this — not even the platform team has access to your password.
profile.emailRoleNote: Email and role can only be changed by an OWNER from the tenant's user management screen.
profile.changePasswordSubtitle: You'll stay signed in. Use the new password on your next sign-in.
profile.successMessage: Password updated. Use the new password on your next sign-in.
profile.sessionSubtitle: End your current session on this browser.
profile.planSectionSubtitle: Current subscription tied to your workspace. Plan limits apply to the whole tenant.
profile.botsAtLimitNote: You've reached your plan's bot limit. Contact the platform team to upgrade.

company.title: My company
company.subtitle: Workspace details for the tenant your user belongs to. Plan and status are managed by the platform team.
company.platformNote: Plan, status and slug can only be changed by the platform team. To request a plan upgrade or change, contact support.
company.editableSubtitle: What you can change yourself as the workspace owner.
company.companyNameHelp: Shown in the admin panel header and on customer-facing notifications.

botCreate.title: Create bot
botCreate.subtitle: Two things are needed: how the bot should behave, and the WhatsApp Business credentials from Meta. Fine-tuning (tone, fallback, documents) is done later from the bot panel.
botCreate.limitBody: The {plan} plan includes {limit} bot(s), and you already have {used}. Contact the platform team to upgrade and add more.

metaGuide.title: Meta setup guide
metaGuide.subtitle: Follow these steps in order.
metaGuide.step1Body: → New app → add the WhatsApp product.
metaGuide.step2PhoneId: Phone Number ID — WhatsApp → API Setup
metaGuide.step3BodyBefore: Fill the fields in the form on the right and click
metaGuide.step4Body: After saving, copy the Callback URL and Verify token from the bot's Edit screen. Paste them in Meta → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook → Edit.
metaGuide.step5Body: In "Webhook fields" → Manage, check the messages event.
metaGuide.step6BodyBefore: Send a real WhatsApp message to your business number — it should appear in

section.detailsSubtitle: Identity and base behavior — only visible inside the admin.
section.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a friendly sales assistant for…
section.systemPromptHelp: Base instructions the model will receive on every conversation.
section.phoneIdHelp: From the WhatsApp dashboard, next to the test number.
section.phoneNumberHelp: Human-readable WhatsApp number shown in the admin panel.
section.wabaIdHelp: WABA ID — useful for templates and metrics.
section.tokenHelp: Stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Starts with EAA.
section.verifyHelp: Set the same value in Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook.

postCreate.successAfter: was created. Upload knowledge documents below to improve its answers — or skip and add them later.

botConfig.title: Agent configuration
botConfig.subtitleAfter: : tone, personality, response rules, welcome and fallback messages, and the underlying model.
botConfig.scopeNoteMiddle: the agent's brain — what it says and how it sounds. For WhatsApp Business credentials (phone ID, access token, webhook), use

aiBehavior.title: AI behavior
aiBehavior.subtitle: Sent to the model on every conversation — shapes how it speaks.
aiBehavior.personalityPlaceholder: Describe traits: empathetic, concise, uses emojis sparingly…
aiBehavior.responseRulesPlaceholder: Always greet by name. Never quote prices without confirming. Escalate to a human if customer is upset…

messages.title: Conversation messages
messages.subtitle: Fixed copy used at key moments of the chat.
messages.welcomePlaceholder: Hi! I'm Kaibot, your assistant. How can I help today?
messages.welcomeHelp: Sent on the first message of a new conversation.
messages.fallbackPlaceholder: I'm not sure I can help with that. Want me to connect you with a person?
messages.fallbackHelp: Sent when the bot doesn't know how to answer.

modelTiming.title: Model & timing
modelTiming.subtitle: Which AI generates the replies and how fast they're sent.
modelTiming.modelHelp: Pick a suggestion or type a custom model ID.
modelTiming.humanDelayHelp: Pauses before each reply to feel more human. Pick a preset or set a custom value.

followup.title: Inactivity follow-up
followup.subtitle: When the customer stops replying, the bot re-engages with context from the latest topic.
followup.enableHelp: The bot writes a contextual message with the LLM — never empty "how can I help?" greetings.
followup.summaryOff: Off — if the customer stops replying, the bot won't follow up.
followup.summaryOn: After {h} h of silence, the bot follows up with context. Up to {n} attempt(s) (~{total} total).
followup.hoursHelp: How long the customer can stay silent before the bot sends each follow-up.
followup.attemptsHelp: When the limit is reached without a reply, the bot stops following up. The counter resets when the customer writes back.

internal.title: Internal
internal.subtitle: Notes for your team and runtime status. Not sent to the model.
internal.descriptionPlaceholder: What this bot is for, who owns it…
internal.botActiveHelp: When off, the bot doesn't reply to incoming WhatsApp messages.

botEdit.title: Edit bot
botEdit.subtitle: Update how your bot behaves and the WhatsApp Business credentials from Meta. Secrets stay unchanged unless you type a new value.
botEdit.step3PasteHere: Fill the fields in the form on the right and click
botEdit.step4ConfigBody: In Meta → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook → Edit. Paste the Callback URL and Verify token shown in the Webhook section on the right.
botEdit.secretsHelp: For security, current values are never shown. Leave blank to keep the value already on the server.
botEdit.newAppSecretPlaceholder: hex string (leave blank to keep current)
botEdit.newAppSecretHelp: Enables HMAC validation for Meta's webhook payloads.
botEdit.webhookHelp: Paste these two values in Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook → Edit.
botEdit.callbackHelpAfter: ). Don't share — paste it in Meta's Callback URL field.
botEdit.verifyHelp: Paste the same value in Meta's "Verify token" field. Meta uses it once to confirm you own the webhook endpoint.

bot.pasteInMeta: Paste both in Meta App → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook.

form.keyHelp: Lowercase a–z, 0–9, dot, dash only. The bot uses this to reference the resource.

list.cachedAtMetaTooltip: Meta has this file cached — the next send is instant

media.superadminNotice: Managing resources on a tenant's bot as super-admin.

documents.cardDescription: Plain text (.txt) or Markdown (.md), up to 5 MB. The backend chunks them, embeds them, and uses them as context in every response.
documents.noTextContent: This document has no extractable text content.
documents.stillProcessing: Document is still {status}. Try again once it shows READY.

detail.composerNote: The message is stored and kept in the history. Outbound delivery to WhatsApp from the agent side is not wired up in the backend yet — confirm with the customer through another channel in the meantime.
detail.closedNote: Conversation closed. It automatically returns to BOT status when the customer sends a new message.
detail.botActiveNote: The bot is responding. Take over the conversation to reply as an agent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information when you use Kaibots.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Kaibots ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, shares, and protects personal information when you use our WhatsApp AI assistant platform (the "Service"). By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to the practices described here.

collect.title: 1. Information we collect
collect.body: We collect account data (name, business name, email, hashed password, phone number), the content of WhatsApp messages exchanged through your assistant (text, media, timestamps and end-user phone numbers), usage logs and analytics (IP, device, language, navigation), training documents you upload, and billing data processed by our payment provider. We do not store full credit card numbers.

use.title: 2. How we use the information
use.body: We process the data to operate and deliver the Service, configure and improve your tenant's assistant, generate analytics and reports for your business, provide customer support, prevent fraud or abuse, and comply with legal obligations. We never use your tenant's data to train shared AI models across other customers.

sharing.title: 3. Sharing with third parties
sharing.body: We share data strictly to operate the Service with: (a) Meta Platforms (WhatsApp Business API) — required to send and receive messages on your behalf, subject to Meta's terms and privacy policy; (b) AI language model providers (such as OpenAI or Anthropic) — to generate responses, subject to their data-processing terms; (c) cloud infrastructure providers (hosting, storage, logging); (d) payment processors; (e) authorities, only when required by law. We do not sell personal data.

retention.title: 4. Data retention
retention.body: We keep conversation data while your account remains active or as needed to provide the Service. You may request deletion of specific conversations or your entire account at any time by writing to info{'@'}kaibots.com. Encrypted backups may persist for up to 90 days after deletion. Records we are legally required to keep (billing, tax) will be kept for the term required by law.

security.title: 5. Security
security.body: We apply technical and organizational measures including HTTPS/TLS in transit, encryption at rest, role-based access control, audit logging, secure authentication, and periodic reviews. No system is 100% secure; we cannot guarantee absolute protection but we will notify affected users of any incident in line with applicable law.

rights.title: 6. Your rights
rights.body: Subject to applicable law, you may access your personal data, request corrections or deletion, restrict or object to processing, request portability, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights write to info{'@'}kaibots.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

endUser.title: 7. Responsibility for your end-users
endUser.body: If you deploy an AI assistant using our Service, you act as data controller of the personal data of your end-users. You are responsible for informing them that their messages are processed by an automated AI system and for obtaining any consent required by applicable data protection law before initiating automated conversations.

children.title: 8. Minors
children.body: The Service is not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you become aware that a minor has provided personal data, contact us so we can delete it.

international.title: 9. International transfers
international.body: Data may be processed in countries other than your own, including the United States and the European Union. Where required, we rely on standard contractual clauses or equivalent safeguards approved by applicable law.

cookies.title: 10. Cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar technologies only for essential functions: authentication, session state, and language preference. We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking.

changes.title: 11. Changes to this Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified by email or through the Service at least 15 days before they take effect. Your continued use of the Service after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about this Policy or want to exercise your rights, write to info{'@'}kaibots.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules for using the Kaibots platform.
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Kaibots platform (the "Service"). By creating an account or using the Service, you accept these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

service.title: 1. Description of the Service
service.body: Kaibots is a multi-tenant platform that allows businesses to operate AI-powered conversational assistants over the WhatsApp Business API, including dashboards, analytics, document training, multimedia resources, human handoff, and integrations with third-party systems.

account.title: 2. Account registration
account.body: To use the Service you must create an account and provide accurate, complete and current information. You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials and for any activity that occurs under your account. You must be at least 18 years old or the legal age in your jurisdiction to use the Service.

acceptable.title: 3. Acceptable use
acceptable.body: You agree to comply with these Terms, applicable law, the WhatsApp Business Policy, the WhatsApp Commerce Policy, and any data protection regulation that applies to your end-users. You must obtain the consents required by your local law before initiating automated conversations and respect any opt-out request from your end-users.

prohibited.title: 4. Prohibited uses
prohibited.body: You may not use the Service to send unsolicited bulk messages (spam), impersonate any person or entity, transmit illegal, infringing, defamatory or harmful content, harass or harm any person, distribute malware, scrape data without authorization, infringe third-party intellectual property, reverse engineer the Service, or circumvent rate limits, quotas, or security measures.

content.title: 5. Your content
content.body: You retain ownership of the content you upload to the Service (training documents, bot personality, multimedia, fallback messages). You grant Kaibots a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to host, process, and transmit that content strictly to operate the Service for you. You represent and warrant that you have the rights to all content you upload.

ai.title: 6. AI-generated responses
ai.body: The Service uses third-party AI language models. AI-generated responses may be inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate for a given context. You are solely responsible for reviewing and supervising automated conversations and for configuring your assistant in line with your business needs. Kaibots is not liable for the content or consequences of AI-generated messages sent through your account.

billing.title: 7. Subscriptions and billing
billing.body: The Service is offered under different plans (such as Free, Pro, and Enterprise) with different limits and features. Paid plans renew automatically at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled in advance. Fees already paid are non-refundable except where required by law. We may change pricing at any time with at least 30 days' notice.

suspension.title: 8. Suspension and termination
suspension.body: We may suspend or terminate your account immediately if you breach these Terms, the WhatsApp Business Policy, or applicable law, or if your continued use puts the Service, other customers, or end-users at risk. You may cancel your account at any time from the dashboard. Upon termination, your access to the Service ceases and your data may be deleted within a reasonable period, subject to the retention rules in our Privacy Policy.

disclaimer.title: 9. Disclaimer of warranties
disclaimer.body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available". To the maximum extent permitted by law, Kaibots disclaims all warranties, express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or that AI responses will be accurate.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Kaibots is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, revenue, data, business opportunity, or reputation. Our total aggregate liability under these Terms is limited to the amount you actually paid for the Service in the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

indemnity.title: 11. Indemnity
indemnity.body: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Kaibots, its officers, directors, employees, and partners from any claim, demand, loss, or expense (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from your use of the Service, your content, or your breach of these Terms or third-party rights.

ip.title: 12. Intellectual property
ip.body: The Service — including software, design, brand, logos, documentation, and trademarks — is owned by Kaibots or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property law. These Terms do not grant you any rights over Kaibots' intellectual property other than the limited right to use the Service in accordance with these Terms.

changes.title: 13. Changes to these Terms
changes.body: We may modify these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be notified through the Service or by email at least 15 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree, you must stop using the Service before the new Terms take effect.

law.title: 14. Governing law
law.body: These Terms shall be governed by the laws applicable in the jurisdiction where Kaibots operates, without prejudice to the mandatory consumer protection rights granted to you by the law of your country of residence.

contact.title: 15. Contact
contact.body: For questions about these Terms write to info{'@'}kaibots.com.
